TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Michel Temer ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 9, Michel Temer, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Brazil ta' misuw hya' ga Michel Temer, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: mi ¶~ ®ńßel temer rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, mi ¶~ ®ńßel temer, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤razil ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mi ¶~ ®ńßel temer, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Michel Temer ryax sa tay 23 nqu tay 9, Michel Temer, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Brazil ta' misuw hya' ga Michel Temer, aring ryax tay 31 squ byacing tay 8 sa kawas 2016 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: mi ¶~ ®ńßel temer rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, mi ¶~ ®ńßel temer, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤razil ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mi ¶~ ®ńßel temer, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
